name: codex-experience-memory
description: Local Markdown experience memory with SAG search and background dreaming.

interface.shortDescription: Remember useful Codex lessons in Markdown.
interface.longDescription: Codex Experience Memory stores reusable lessons as Markdown, rebuilds a local SQLite SAG index for related-file search, and runs a launchd watcher for sleep-time AI summaries.
defaultPrompt: Search my experience memory for this task.
Reflect on this session and write useful lessons.
Check related memory files before editing.
